description: CloudWatch Logs ingestion charges spike when a staging release accidentally enables DEBUG-level JSON structured logging across 40 Lambda functions in production.

root_cause.summary: 40 Lambda functions deployed with LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG via a shared layer update. Each invocation now writes ~8x the previous log volume to CloudWatch Logs at $0.50/GB ingestion.
root_cause.remediation: Pin LOG_LEVEL=INFO in the shared Lambda layer. Set CloudWatch Log Group retention to 7 days for Lambda functions. Add a metric filter + alarm on log volume.
